ns0:entry.ns0:title: 0x4m4/hexstrike-ai
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/0x4m4/hexstrike-ai
Language: python
HexStrike AI MCP Agents is an advanced MCP server that lets AI agents (Claude, GPT, Copilot, etc.) autonomously run 150+ cybersecurity tools for automated pentesting, vulnerability discovery, bug bounty automation, and security research. Seamlessly bridge LLMs with real-world offensive security capabilities.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: 666ghj/MiroFish
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/666ghj/MiroFish
Language: python
A Simple and Universal Swarm Intelligence Engine, Predicting Anything. 简洁通用的群体智能引擎，预测万物

ns0:entry.ns0:title: IBM/mcp-context-forge
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/IBM/mcp-context-forge
Language: python
An AI Gateway, registry, and proxy that sits in front of any MCP, A2A, or REST/gRPC APIs, exposing a unified endpoint with centralized discovery, guardrails and management. Optimizes Agent & Tool calling, and supports plugins.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MemPalace/mempalace
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MemPalace/mempalace
Language: python
The best-benchmarked open-source AI memory system. And it's free.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PaddlePaddle/PaddleOCR
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/PaddleOCR
Language: python
Turn any PDF or image document into structured data for your AI. A powerful, lightweight OCR toolkit that bridges the gap between images/PDFs and LLMs. Supports 100+ languages.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Panniantong/Agent-Reach
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Panniantong/Agent-Reach
Language: python
Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Shubhamsaboo/awesome-llm-apps
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Shubhamsaboo/awesome-llm-apps
Language: python
100+ AI Agent & RAG apps you can actually run — clone, customize, ship.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: agentscope-ai/agentscope
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/agentscope-ai/agentscope
Language: python
Build and run agents you can see, understand and trust.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ansible/ansible
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ansible/ansible
Language: python
Ansible is a radically simple IT automation platform that makes your applications and systems easier to deploy and maintain. Automate everything from code deployment to network configuration to cloud management, in a language that approaches plain English, using SSH, with no agents to install on remote systems. https://docs.ansible.com.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cheahjs/free-llm-api-resources
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cheahjs/free-llm-api-resources
Language: python
A list of free LLM inference resources accessible via API.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: github/spec-kit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/github/spec-kit
Language: python
💫 Toolkit to help you get started with Spec-Driven Development

ns0:entry.ns0:title: khoj-ai/khoj
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/khoj-ai/khoj
Language: python
Your AI second brain. Self-hostable. Get answers from the web or your docs. Build custom agents, schedule automations, do deep research. Turn any online or local LLM into your personal, autonomous AI (gpt, claude, gemini, llama, qwen, mistral). Get started - free.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mvanhorn/last30days-skill
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mvanhorn/last30days-skill
Language: python
AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openai/whisper
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openai/whisper
Language: python
Robust Speech Recognition via Large-Scale Weak Supervision
